interpretation_text: SPB_PRICE is the INAMI/RIZIV ex-factory price field for reimbursable specialties and maps to comparison_category=manufacturer_price. It is treated as VAT-exclusive and excluding standard wholesale or pharmacy margins.
caveats: The first pass uses the observed ex-factory lane only.
Hospital-only reimbursement, reference-pricing, and public-price lanes are deferred until the base lane is verified against a real snapshot.

notes: SPB_PRICE is documented as the ex-factory price in the INAMI/RIZIV reference-file description.
This lane is directly comparable to other VAT-exclusive manufacturer-price lanes when identity, strength, dosage-form, and pack-size normalization succeed.
